india_trends.title: PM Modi to hold talks with UAE, Dutch, Swedish, Norwegian and Italian leadership in major tour from May 15–20
india_trends.summary: As the clock strikes May 15, 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi sets forth on a pivotal journey through Europe and the Middle East. His itinerary includes visits to the United Arab Emirates, Netherlands, Sweden, Norway, and Italy. Central to this tour is the aim to bolster trade relations, foster en

india_trends.title: Jewellery stocks slide after Modi urges Indians to buy less gold
india_trends.summary: The call for action comes at a time when retailers are already struggling to ensure volume growth due to record high gold prices

india_trends.title: India to measure its growing creative economy just like manufacturing
india_trends.summary: India is developing new statistical tools to measure its fast-growing creative economy, including IP, digital content and cultural industries. The government plans a Services Production Index and updated classifications for influencers, gaming and blogging under Viksit Bharat 2047 goals.

india_trends.title: Satin Creditcare profit jumps on lower bad loan provisions
india_trends.summary: Satin Creditcare Network reported a sharp rise in fourth-quarter profit driven by business growth, lower bad loan provisions and improved asset quality. The microfinance lender also recorded strong annual earnings growth, while assets under management expanded steadily across its lending businesses.

india_trends.title: Satin Creditcare profit jumps on lower bad loan provisions
india_trends.summary: Satin Creditcare Network reported a sharp rise in fourth-quarter profit driven by business growth, lower bad loan provisions and improved asset quality. The microfinance lender also recorded strong annual earnings growth, while assets under management expanded steadily across its lending businesses.

india_trends.title: Early investors in Groww set to reap up to $498 million in block deal
india_trends.summary: The proposed transaction involves the sale of up to 268.4 million shares, representing around 4.3% of Groww’s existing total outstanding shares, through one or more on-market transactions on Indian stock exchanges.

india_trends.title: Upcoming IPO: Gaurik Fashion files DRHP with SEBI to raise funds through public issue
india_trends.summary: Gaurik Fashion submitted its Draft Red Herring Prospectus on May 10, 2026, to raise funds via an IPO of up to 70,00,000 equity shares. Proceeds will fund new stores, debt repayment, and corporate purposes. The shares will be listed on Indian stock exchanges.

india_trends.title: Q1 fuel losses may eliminate entire fiscal-year earnings
india_trends.summary: Despite a 50 per cent surge in input crude oil prices, petrol and diesel continue to be priced at a two-year-old rate of Rs 94.77 a litre and Rs 87.67 per litre respectively. Domestic cooking gas LPG prices were raised in March by Rs 60 per cylinder, but they are still way lower than the actual cost

india_trends.title: Q1 fuel losses may eliminate entire fiscal-year earnings of Indian OMCs
india_trends.summary: Since the war broke out in the Middle East 10 weeks ago, state-owned oil marketing companies (OMCs) have ensured uninterrupted supplies of petrol, diesel and cooking gas LPG at rates that are way below cost, unlike many global energy systems that imposed rationing or passed through steep price incre

india_trends.title: Groww stake sale: Peak XV, Sequoia, others to sell equity worth Rs 4,750 crore; floor price at Rs 177/share
india_trends.summary: Existing investors in Groww, including Sequoia Capital and Ribbit Capital, plan to sell shares worth Rs 4,750 crore through block deals at a discount. The proposed transaction triggered a sharp decline in the stock price amid concerns over large institutional stake sales.

india_trends.title: Bybit’s Mykolas Majauskas Advocates Tokenisation to Drive India’s $1 Trillion Fintech Economy
Market Trading Guide: Buy Tata Consumer and Welspun Corp on Tuesday for gains up to 14%
india_trends.summary: Nifty extended losses for a third straight session amid heavy selling in banking, auto and energy stocks. Analysts warned of a bearish trend after technical breakdowns below key moving averages, while recommending Tata Consumer and Welspun Corp as bullish positional trading opportunities

india_trends.title: India declines Russian LNG under sanctions, talks continue on permitted cargoes, sources say
india_trends.summary: India has refused Russian liquefied natural gas shipments under United States sanctions. This decision comes amid energy supply concerns due to Middle East tensions. A Russian LNG tanker bound for India remains in limbo. India prioritizes avoiding sanctioned cargoes due to compliance risks. Russia s

india_trends.title: JP Morgan sees Brent staying in low $100s even if Hormuz reopens in June
india_trends.summary: JP Morgan's revised framework assumes that ‌the pace ⁠of ⁠oil inventory depletion will ultimately force the Strait to reopen "one way or another," ​with the bank's base case anchored on a June 1 reopening following a ​credible announcement confirmed by both sides.

india_trends.title: Investment bank Lincoln International eyes $2 billion valuation in US IPO
india_trends.summary: The spring IPO market is seeing a strong pickup in activity after a brief lull ​in March as issuers look past geopolitical uncertainty ⁠to move ‌ahead with their listing plans.In the busiest ​week for ​big IPOs since 2021, three billion-dollar offerings are ⁠set to price, according to Renaissance Ca

india_trends.title: Unfazed by NSE’s commodity push, market share remains intact: MCX chief
india_trends.summary: MCX chief executive Praveena Rai says the bourse continues to dominate the commodity derivatives ecosystem since she took over, despite the competition launching new contracts and revising expiry schedules to gain traction.

india_trends.title: Markets tumble after Modi urges curbs on fuel use, gold buying
india_trends.summary: On Monday, the Nifty 50 and the Sensex marked their steepest single-day fall since 30 March, slumping 1.49% and 1.7%, respectively.

india_trends.title: Akasa Air to start Noida airport flights from June 16
india_trends.summary: Noida International Airport will welcome Akasa Air flights starting June 16. This marks the second airline to operate from the new airport. Akasa Air will offer daily services to Bengaluru and Navi Mumbai. The airline also plans to establish a maintenance facility at the airport. IndiGo will commenc

india_trends.title: India’s jobless rate rises to 5% in Q4
india_trends.summary: India's unemployment rate climbed to 5% in the January-March quarter. This rise was primarily due to an increase in joblessness among women. Overall urban unemployment saw a slight decrease, while rural unemployment edged up. Youth unemployment also experienced an upward trend during this period. La
